title: Bingle Pack Again - 2026
description: Create and trimmings, mashed forcefully with Tech Mods and sprinkled with adventure.
body:
# The Bingle Pack(™) but again and then also again #
<details>
<summary>Bingle Pack 2026:</summary>
  
New year, new bongle! Wait, no, bagnel? Bagel?
Whatever, anyway, however, _perchance_
Bingle is getting an update, both mods and this time a whole new Minecraft version! (still not current though lol) Botany is out! And it's time for new factories powered by new power, making new food with new blocks and shipped with new vehicles. Bingle now finally has Create: Aeronautics, so I hope your server host is ready!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Bingle Pack 2:</summary>
  
Initially only QoL and a little bit of content, Bingle Pack Again 2.0< has become a tech mod mashup pack of Create's steampunk, Botania's techno-magical, Forestry's "natural" and Applied Energistics' aggresive digital engineering. Sprinkled on-top with enough random content to give any player enough to keep them busy outside of hyper-optimising their automated bee-farming contraption. 

From the caves of Alex's to Taverns' quests, to the numerous small animal companions, you're unlikely to even encounter everything in all but the long playthroughs, so good luck trying to find a way to play them all at the same time!

</details>

## Quick Start ##
### Client/Singleplayer ###
1. Download the latest 'Release' build via Modrinth, preferably the app for quick updates.
2. Probably set Memory Allocation to 4GB or above.
3. Start Minecraft, enable Shaders if you want (Complementary Reimagined included), set your mouse buttons the correct way around, and get playing!

### Server ###
1. Either add to any Modrinth Hosting server, or download the latest 'Beta' build via the Modrinth app and copy the 'mods' and 'config' folders into its corresponding FML Server instance [downloaded from here](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/).
2. Add --nogui, set -Xmx4G or more, and flip the switch.

See the dependency list for mods, they're liable to change between versions so a list here wouldn't be too helpful!

Okay, that's it. Have fun! (And remember, this only started as a pack with friends, so don't be surprised if it's an unbalanced mess!)
